subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto all who dwell in the realm of contingent being. Verily, whosoever hath turned unto it hath attained that which was promised in the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان ان الذی اقبل الیه انه فاز بما وعد فی الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @belief and denial, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
